/usr/bin/g++ -g -O2 CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/dampingForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/elasticForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/elasticPlate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/elasticStretchingForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/externalGravityForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/inertialForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/setInput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/timeStepper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simDER.dir/world.cpp.o -o simDER  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so -Wl,--start-group -lmkl_intel_lp64 -lmkl_intel_thread -lmkl_core -Wl,--end-group -liomp5 -lpthread -lm -ldl
